xml.specific_character:
Basti ui_actor_portrets_gf2_basti
Basti gf2_basti isg stalker_terrain characters_voice\human\woman\ 15000 5000 -1 actors\gf2_basti\gf2_basti
[spawn] \n wpn_usp_basti \n ammo_11.43x23_hydro = 6 \n #include "gameplay\supplies\character_items.xml" #include "gameplay\supplies\character_food.xml" #include "gameplay\supplies\character_drugs_2.xml"
#include "gameplay\character_criticals.xml" gf2_basti_greet gf2_basti_misc gf2_basti_recruitment gf2_basti_dismiss actor_break_dialog
